message:
feat(fnp-io): add DEFLATE compression support for NPZ read/write

Add flate2 dependency and extend the NPZ archive implementation to
support both STORE (method 0) and DEFLATE (method 8) compression:

write side:
- New NpzCompression enum (Store | Deflate)
- New write_npz_bytes_with_compression() that accepts a compression
  mode; existing write_npz_bytes() delegates with Store for backward
  compatibility
- Deflate path uses flate2::DeflateEncoder at default compression level

read side:
- read_npz_bytes() now accepts DEFLATE entries (compression method 8)
  in addition to STORE
- Validates local header signature and local/central directory
  compression method agreement
- Verifies decoded length matches declared uncompressed size
- Verifies CRC-32 of decoded data against central directory record
- Added central directory bounds-overflow check
- Budget validation now tracks cumulative uncompressed bytes to guard
  against zip bombs

tests:
- npz_deflate_single_array_roundtrip: write+read DEFLATE f64 array
- npz_unsupported_compression_rejected: method 1 is rejected
- npz_deflate_corrupted_payload_rejected: bit-flipped deflate stream
  triggers error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
